commit_scope: Move the static-to-dynamic wellness lane to live Form successor cells and remove the repeated wants_dynamic attention rows.

local_validation.summary: The new static-to-dynamic Form band returns 262143 in source and binary validation. The tending query returns the static-to-dynamic lane with four live successor surfaces. Wellness now reports dynamic_successor rows, lane_end_state: 4/4 dynamic successors live, and what_wants_attention: none.

ci_validation.reason: Remote CI is pending until this branch is pushed and a PR is opened.

deploy_validation.reason: No deployment has run yet for this local Form/wellness lane change.

phase_gate.reason: Local validation passed; CI and deploy validation remain pending until PR and release flow.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The static-to-dynamic lane is no longer reported as unresolved wellness attention. Fixed source ledgers now point at live dynamic successor cells with carrier paths, proof commands, release gates, and evidence counts.
test_flows: static-to-dynamic-cells-band proves all four successor cells are valid, active, live, and named by registered Blueprints
make static-to-dynamic-tending returns the lane cell with four live successor rows
wellness reports what_wants_attention: none and places lane_end_state in what_can_compost
test_static_to_dynamic_cells_are_live_not_attention protects the resolved lane from regressing to wants_dynamic attention

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/static-to-dynamic-cells.fk defines static source surfaces, dynamic successors, lane validity, live counts, and end-state checks.
form/form-stdlib/tests/static-to-dynamic-cells-band.fk returns 262143 across source and binary validation.
form/form-stdlib/queries/static-to-dynamic-tending.fk returns the live lane for human and agent tending.
scripts/wellness_check.py reports dynamic_successor rows, live evidence counts, and lane_end_state instead of wants_dynamic rows.
api/tests/test_edge_cases_regression.py asserts the lane leaves what_wants_attention and enters what_can_compost.
docs/shared/agent-start-packet.md now teaches the live Form lane, proof band, and tending command.
